title: Guardian Datacores
summary: Recovered from biome guardians. Turn them in to progress the Nexus route.
body: Guardian Datacores contain critical intel about the Gridfall and Earth contact.
Turn them in through the Terminal to advance the Nexus route.
Each datacore unlocks new choices and deeper story layers.
steps: Recover the datacore and return to the Terminal.
commonMistakes: Carrying a datacore for too long without turning it in.
